name: carloshpdoc-plugins
description: iOS-opinionated Claude Code workflow automation: Swift 6 migration, Apollo→native SDK removal, stacked PRs, Jira integration, Xcode build optimization.

plugins.name: xcode-build-suite
plugins.description: End-to-end Xcode build-time optimization: benchmark → analyze (compile/project/SPM) → recommend → apply with approval → re-benchmark. Standalone, no templating required.

plugins.name: ios-workflow
plugins.description: iOS workflow automation: Swift 6 migration pipeline, Apollo→native SDK removal, stacked PRs ≤600 lines via gh CLI, Jira-driven PR opener, feature-flag cleanup, perf playbook, SwiftLint fixer. Commands and agents use {{PLACEHOLDER}} templates — install via bootstrap.sh from the repo for per-project substitution, or use this plugin to preview before adopting.

plugins.name: claude-utilities
plugins.description: Cross-stack utilities: turn recent technical work into LinkedIn/Twitter drafts (`content`), federated knowledge-base search across ~/Desktop/knowledge + repo + memory dir (`knowledge`), turn meeting notes into Jira tasks (`create-tasks`).
